data.raceComments: {"comment":"The time-honoured Sydney Cup is worth 2 million dollars over 2 miles, and 4. SOUL OF SPAIN will be peaking at the right time after a fair effort over 2400m in the G1 Tancred Stakes 2 weeks ago on a track that was probably softer than he preferred. He won't have any issue with the trip, and dropping 4.5kg in weight is the key. Hard to beat. 13. NEWLOOK stepped up to 2600m third up from a spell, and was too strong in the G2 Chairmans Quality here last week, and he will drop a further 2kg in weight here. He has just needed time to strengthen up, and he is perfectly placed to repeat the dose, especially if the track is wet. 8. PIGGYBACK will carry 4kg less than she did 2 weeks ago in the Tancred, and is on the same weight as when she won the G3 Parramatta Cup at Rosehill in February. The blinkers are off again, and if she sees out 3200m, then she has top 4 claims. 11. MR MONACO has come a long way in a short time, winning the G2 Manion Cup 3 weeks ago. Jamie Melham rides, so go again.","runners":[4,13,8,11],"exclusive":true}
